ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., Addition) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the operation (e.g., +) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the operation works */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level of the operation (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  "example_code" TEXT /* Code snippet demonstrating how to use the operation */,
  "supported_languages" TEXT /* Programming languages in which the operation is supported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation being demonstrated */,
  "example_input" TEXT /* Input values for the example operation */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the example operation */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the example */,
  "code_snippet" TEXT /* Complete code snippet for the example */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation performed */,
  "input_values" TEXT /* Input values used in the operation */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the operation */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the operation in seconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the operation was performed */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input values (e.g., integer, float, array) */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output values */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., success, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_history_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preferences belong to */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., dark mode, light mode) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference for the interface */,
  "decimal_precision" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places to display in results */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's preferred timezone */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* User's notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation requested */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Time the request was made */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the request in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the request */,
  "api_version" TEXT /* Version of the API being used */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the API response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who encountered the error */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation that failed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the error */,
  "stack_trace" TEXT /* Detailed stack trace for the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the key belongs to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The actual API key as a string */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the API key is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission is a default for the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation for which metrics are being recorded */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Average execution time for the operation */,
  "operation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the operation has been performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were recorded */,
  "average_input_size" REAL /* Average size of input data */,
  "average_output_size" REAL /* Average size of output data */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of operations that resulted in errors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_metrics_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)
